LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS D.N. SECURITY SERVICES, L.L.C. AND DAVID NAGLE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: OVERRULED AS TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION; THERE IS A PRIVATE RIGHT OF ACTION PURSUANT TO LABOR CODE 218, WHICH IS TO BE READ IN CONJUNCTION WITH LABOR CODE SECTION 226.7. A MOTION TO STRIKE IS THE PROPER WAY TO CHALLENGE THE RELIEF SOUGHT. SUSTAIN AS TO THE SEVENTH CAUSE OF ACTION WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. OVERRRULED AS TO THE NINTH CAUSE OF ACTION; GIVEN PLAINTIFF'S CAUSE OF ACTION FOR RETALIATION PHILLIPS V GEMINI MOVING SPECIALISTS ALLOWS THE CAUSE OF ACTION. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

ARGUED AND THE COURT CONTINUED THE MATTER TO 05/20/09. PLAINTIFF TO LODGE BILLING RECORDS WITH THE COURT. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF MANUEL MUNOZ-ALFARO'S NOTICE OF HEARING AND APPLICATION FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: APPLICATION FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF IS THE PREVAILING PARTY ENTITLED TO ATTORNEY FEES UNDER LABOR CODE SECTION 218.5, 226(E), 2699(G)(1) AND 1194, AND CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 1021.5. THE HOURLY RATES CHARGED ARE REASONABLE. THE COURT COMPARED THE SUCCESSIVE PLEADINGS AND DECLARATIONS AND THE BILLING RECORDS, AND AWARDS PLAINTIFF THE LODESTAR AMOUNT OF $104,884 AS REASONABLE ATTORNEY FEES FOR WORK PERFORMED ON PLAINTIFF'S INDIVIDUAL CLAIMS. REASONABLE COSTS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $4,330.00. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

Notice Of Hearong And Application For Attorney'S Fees And Costs
Off Calendar May-20-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF MANUEL MUNOZ-ALFARO'S Notice of Hearing and Application for Attorney's Fees and Costs. Appearances: Arif Virji, Esq. of Lynch, Gilardi & Grummer (415) 397-2800, appearing for Plaintiff and moving party; Joseph A. Schwachter, Esq. of Litter Mendelson P.C. (415) 433-1940, appearing for Defendant and opposing party; Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Application for attorney's fees and costs is granted. Plaintiff is the prevailing party entitled to attorney fees under Labor Code section 218.5, 226(e), 2699(g)(1) and 1194, and Code of Civil Procedure section 1021.5. The hourly rates charged are reasonable. The Court compared the successive pleadings and declarations and the billing records, and awards plaintiff the Lodestar amount of $104,884 as reasonable attorney fees for work performed on plaintiff's individual claims. Reasonable costs are awarded in the amount of $4,330.00. Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW/PB)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER.
